name: Rugelach--II
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Cream Cheese (I use Philadelphia light or no-fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, cream cheese, egg yolks, sugar, vanilla, and salt until smooth.
2. Gradually add flour and mix until a dough forms.
3. Form the dough into a ball and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Divide the dough into 4 equal parts.
5. Cut each part into wedges.
6. Fill each wedge with your desired filling (e.g., Polaner sugarless jam, chopped nuts, and cinnamon).
7. Roll up each filled wedge tightly and place on a baking sheet without greasing.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
Filling: You can use Polaner sugarless jam with chopped nuts and cinnamon, or simply roll the dough in chopped nuts and bake without jam.
